name: codebrief-capture
description: Distills developer intent with Codex and sends only scrubbed derived annotations to Codebrief.

interface.shortDescription: Capture scrubbed development intent from Codex sessions
interface.longDescription: Distill decisions, plans, deferrals, and constraints from enabled Codex repositories, then send only bounded and scrubbed intent annotations to your Codebrief workspace.
interface.defaultPrompt: Show my Codebrief Capture status and enabled repositories.
